_comment: pi-tmux-title config. Precedence (later overrides earlier): global ~/.pi/agent/pi-tmux-title.json < extension ./config.json (this dir) < project <cwd>/.pi/pi-tmux-title.json (trusted). Partial configs merge over the built-in defaults. Zero config = defaults below. Adds a state icon PREFIX before the tmux window's existing name (#W); never renames the window or touches automatic-rename. Mechanism: per-window user option @pi_t = '<icon> ' + idempotent global format patch (#W -> #{@pi_t}#W). States: idle=prefix, generating=busy, done=done-badge (only if pi lost focus when the turn finished; focus-in reverts to prefix). Focus via DEC 1004 (needs `set -g focus-events on` in tmux). No-op outside tmux / TUI mode. Use /tmux-title reload after edits.
